description: For a new listing, the agent needs to schedule a professional photographer.

nodes.task_description: Identify the property address and the preferred real estate photographer from the vendor list.

expected_outcome.value: Agent selects the correct property and photographer.

nodes.task_description: Contact the photographer to check their availability and schedule the photoshoot.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully books the photographer for a specific date and time.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the appointment with the seller and add it to their calendar.

expected_outcome.value: Agent coordinates with the seller and updates their calendar.
